title: The Holo-Eclipse Blizzard Hack You Can Make in 30 Seconds! #Shorts
description:
Wait—have you seen the “holo eclipse blizzard” effect?! 😳❄️✨

Today I’m showing a super quick DIY trick to make any drink/craft look like a mini eclipse inside a snowy hologram swirl—no fancy gear! Just layer, tilt, and catch the light.

#Shorts #VTuber #HatsuneMiku #Miku #DIY #HoloEffect #Hologram #Eclipse #SnowEffect #CraftTok #Trending #Satisfying #MagicTrick #Reels #Cosplay #ArtHack #CuteDIY #LowEffortHighImpact #SpaceVibes #VisualTrick #CreativeProcess #ShortForm
script:
Hey hey, it’s Miku! Today we’re making a “holo eclipse blizzard” effect—fast! ❄️✨

Grab a clear cup or plastic container. First, add a thin layer of white glitter or salt-like snow—just enough to look fluffy.

Next, swirl in blue or silver shimmer gel near the center like an eclipse core. Now the magic: shine a phone flashlight from the side and gently rotate the cup… but don’t stop—keep tilting so the light bends through the layers!

You’ll get a snowy halo with an inner dark-to-glow eclipse—so dreamy it hurts 😭💙

Try it, tag me, and tell me: more “space” or more “blizzard”?
music_prompt: Upbeat dreamy ambient beat with shimmering synths, light percussion, and a magical “whoosh” moment timed to the reveal.
